title: git-remote-read — output
description: Output of the git-remote-read Tool — the structured detection result the read-repo-root Step passes to downstream Steps. is_git and has_remote drive the MUC-001 / MUC-006 branches.

is_git.description: true if `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` exited zero; false otherwise (drives MUC-001 abort path).

has_remote.description: true if `git remote get-url origin` exited zero; false otherwise (drives MUC-006 abort path).

remote_url.description: The origin remote URL when has_remote=true; null otherwise.

primary_branch.description: The current branch name from `git branch --show-current`; null when not on a branch (detached HEAD).

repo_root.description: Absolute path from `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` when is_git=true; null otherwise.
